chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA Criminal Transfer Application No.S-77 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection "A". 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-. 13.12.2018 Mr. Inayatullah G. Morio, Advocate for the Applicants. Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G. Respondents No.1 & 2 Shahid Ali Khan and Gulzar Chandio, respectively present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. With consent of the parties, the case (Sessions Case No.662/2016, Shahid Ali Khan Thebo v/s. Ali Ashraf @ Wilayat Chandio and others) is withdrawn from the file of learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Mehar and is assigned to the learned Sessions Judge, Dadu for its disposal in accordance with law. Instant criminal transfer application stands disposed of in the above terms. J udge Manzoor
